reviews.comment:
Buena ubicación del lugar,  limpio,  sin tiempo de espera.
El ingreso a la estación es de piedras partidas y la ubicación hace que sea difícil bajar de la ruta de forma segura.

(Translated by Google)
The location is good, the place is clean, and there's no waiting time.
The entrance to the station is made of broken stones, and the location makes it difficult to get off the road safely.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBNzlLclpREAE
